subcodes.first_line: O thou who seekest My trace! Know thou that My trace encompasseth the heavens and the earth, and in every station is My trace, were thou to perceive [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اردت اثری فاعلم اثری احاط السموات و الارض و فی مقام کل شیء اثری لو
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @divine attributes are within all things; every atom, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
